title: Include the FROM directive in Docker history Closes #2391
body:
<!--
Thanks for sending a pull request!

Please make sure you've read and understood our contributing guidelines
(https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) as well as ensuring
that all your commits are signed with `git commit -s`.
-->

#### What type of PR is this?

> /kind bug

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

As requested by @TomSweeneyRedHat  on https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues/2391, taken from:
 https://bugzilla.redhat.com/show_bug.cgi?id=1649044 

#### How to verify it

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

#2391

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

Please let me know if this fixes the issue, otherwise I'll continue to add better functionality. Thanks!! :) 

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

None

```release-note

```

comments.body:
Thanks @ironknight78 for the PR, Can you squash and sign your commits.  
Could you also add a test for this.
Of course. Where should I add the tests @rhatdan ?? 😁

You can add tests in tests/*bats.

tests/history.bats would probably be best place.

@ironknight78 You need to do the following in your git repo

git rebase -i origin

Now you should be placed in an editor.
In each of your 10 PR lines after the first,  you will swap out the first few characters with a "s"
Save your edit.

This should put you in a second edit where you can fixup the commit message.
@ironknight78 thanks for your work and hope you get through the git maze!
@TomSweeneyRedHat haha it's getting tricky!!! I'll fix it. 😁
